action_mappings.detach_source_file: detach source file {} from reconciliation case {}

action_mappings.unlink_matching_key: unlink matching key {} from reconciliation case {}

action_mappings.unlink_counterparty_account: unlink counterparty account {} from reconciliation case {}

action_mappings.unlink_payment_instruction: unlink payment instruction {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.link_control_identifier: link control identifier {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.unlink_control_identifier: unlink control identifier {} from reconciliation case {}

action_mappings.mark_documents_verified: mark documents verified for reconciliation case {} using source file {}

action_mappings_indef.unlink_transaction_from_case: unlink a ledger transaction {} from a reconciliation case {}

action_mappings_indef.detach_source_file: detach a source file {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.initiate_investigation: initiate investigation for a reconciliation case {} with a source file {}

action_mappings_indef.link_matching_key: link a matching key {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.unlink_matching_key: unlink a matching key {} from a reconciliation case {}

action_mappings_indef.unlink_counterparty_account: unlink a counterparty account {} from a reconciliation case {}

predicate_mappings.case_linked_transaction: the case {} is linked to the transaction {}
predicate_mappings.case_linked_matching_key: {} is linked to the matching key {}
predicate_mappings.case_linked_counterparty_account: {} is linked to the counterparty account {}
predicate_mappings.case_linked_payment_instruction: {} is linked to the payment instruction {}
predicate_mappings.case_linked_control_identifier: {} is linked to the control identifier {}
predicate_mappings.case_linked_settlement_instruction: {} is linked to the settlement instruction {}
predicate_mappings.case_profile_candidate: {} is a candidate for the case profile {}
predicate_mappings.case_transaction_candidate: {} is a candidate for the transaction {}
predicate_mappings.case_settlement_candidate: {} is a candidate for the settlement {}
predicate_mappings.case_matching_key_candidate: {} is a candidate for the matching key {}
predicate_mappings.case_counterparty_account_candidate: {} is a candidate for the counterparty account {}
predicate_mappings.case_payment_instruction_candidate: {} is a candidate for the payment instruction {}
predicate_mappings.case_counterparty_confirmation_candidate: {} is a candidate for the counterparty confirmation {}
predicate_mappings.case_control_identifier_candidate: {} is a candidate for the control identifier {}
predicate_mappings.case_escalation_option_link: {} is linked to the escalation category {}
predicate_mappings.case_variant_profile_link: {} is linked to the variant profile {}
predicate_mappings.case_profile_default_mapping: {} uses the default mapping for the case profile with {}

preconditions: I can only register a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the case A is registered and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I register a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case A is registered

link_transaction_to_case.description: link a ledger transaction B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a ledger transaction B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the transaction B
I can only link a ledger transaction B to a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the case A has matches
effects: Once I link a ledger transaction B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case A is linked to the transaction B and the case A has matches
Once I link a ledger transaction B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_transaction_from_case.description: unlink a ledger transaction B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a ledger transaction B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is linked to the transaction B
I can only unlink a ledger transaction B from a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that A is verified by accounting and it is not the case that A has an escalation requested
effects: Once I unlink a ledger transaction B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I unlink a ledger transaction B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is linked to the transaction B and it is not the case anymore that the case A has matches and it is not the case anymore that the investigation for A has started and it is not the case anymore that the validation for A is complete and it is not the case anymore that A is pending escalation and it is not the case anymore that A has been approved for escalation and it is not the case anymore that A requires manual review

attach_source_file.description: attach a source file B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only attach a source file B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available
effects: Once I attach a source file B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A has the source file B attached
Once I attach a source file B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_source_file.description: detach a source file B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only detach a source file B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A has the source file B attached
effects: Once I detach a source file B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach a source file B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A has the source file B attached

initiate_investigation.description: initiate investigation for a reconciliation case A with a source file B
preconditions: I can only initiate investigation for a reconciliation case A with a source file B if it is the case that the case A is registered and the case A has matches and A has the source file B attached
I can only initiate investigation for a reconciliation case A with a source file B if it is not the case that the investigation for A has started
effects: Once I initiate investigation for a reconciliation case A with a source file B, it is the case that the investigation for A has started

assign_reconciliation_operator.description: assign a reconciliation operator B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only assign a reconciliation operator B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the case A has matches and B is available
I can only assign a reconciliation operator B to a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the investigation for A has started
effects: Once I assign a reconciliation operator B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the investigation for A has started and A is pending escalation
Once I assign a reconciliation operator B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

ingest_document_reference.description: ingest a document reference C from a source file B into a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only ingest a document reference C from a source file B into a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the investigation for A has started and the case A has matches and A has the source file B attached and C is available
I can only ingest a document reference C from a source file B into a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the validation for A is complete
effects: Once I ingest a document reference C from a source file B into a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the validation for A is complete
Once I ingest a document reference C from a source file B into a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is pending escalation

apply_validation_profile.description: apply a validation profile B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only apply a validation profile B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A has matches and B is applied to the case A
I can only apply a validation profile B to a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the validation for A is complete
effects: Once I apply a validation profile B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the validation for A is complete
Once I apply a validation profile B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is pending escalation

link_matching_key.description: link a matching key B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a matching key B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the matching key B
effects: Once I link a matching key B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is linked to the matching key B
Once I link a matching key B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_matching_key.description: unlink a matching key B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a matching key B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is linked to the matching key B
effects: Once I unlink a matching key B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a matching key B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the matching key B

link_counterparty_account.description: link a counterparty account B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a counterparty account B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the counterparty account B
effects: Once I link a counterparty account B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is linked to the counterparty account B
Once I link a counterparty account B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_counterparty_account.description: unlink a counterparty account B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a counterparty account B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is linked to the counterparty account B
effects: Once I unlink a counterparty account B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a counterparty account B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the counterparty account B

link_payment_instruction.description: link a payment instruction B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a payment instruction B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the payment instruction B
effects: Once I link a payment instruction B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is linked to the payment instruction B
Once I link a payment instruction B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_payment_instruction.description: unlink a payment instruction B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a payment instruction B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is linked to the payment instruction B
effects: Once I unlink a payment instruction B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a payment instruction B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the payment instruction B

link_control_identifier.description: link a control identifier B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a control identifier B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the control identifier B
effects: Once I link a control identifier B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is linked to the control identifier B
Once I link a control identifier B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_control_identifier.description: unlink a control identifier B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a control identifier B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is linked to the control identifier B
effects: Once I unlink a control identifier B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a control identifier B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the control identifier B

run_accounting_alignment_check.description: run accounting alignment check for a reconciliation case A with a settlement instruction B, a matching key C, and a counterparty account D
preconditions: I can only run accounting alignment check for a reconciliation case A with a settlement instruction B, a matching key C, and a counterparty account D if it is the case that the case A has matches and A is linked to the matching key C and A is linked to the counterparty account D and B is available and A is a candidate for the settlement B

I can only run accounting alignment check for a reconciliation case A with a settlement instruction B, a matching key C, and a counterparty account D if it is not the case that A is verified by accounting
effects: Once I run accounting alignment check for a reconciliation case A with a settlement instruction B, a matching key C, and a counterparty account D, it is the case that A is linked to the settlement instruction B and A is verified by accounting
Once I run accounting alignment check for a reconciliation case A with a settlement instruction B, a matching key C, and a counterparty account D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

run_settlement_reconciliation_with_confi.description: run settlement reconciliation with confirmation for a reconciliation case A using a settlement instruction B, a payment instruction C, and a counterparty confirmation D
preconditions: I can only run settlement reconciliation with confirmation for a reconciliation case A using a settlement instruction B, a payment instruction C, and a counterparty confirmation D if it is the case that the case A has matches and A is linked to the payment instruction C and D is available and B is available and A is a candidate for the settlement B and A is a candidate for the counterparty confirmation D

I can only run settlement reconciliation with confirmation for a reconciliation case A using a settlement instruction B, a payment instruction C, and a counterparty confirmation D if it is not the case that A is verified by accounting
effects: Once I run settlement reconciliation with confirmation for a reconciliation case A using a settlement instruction B, a payment instruction C, and a counterparty confirmation D, it is the case that A is linked to the settlement instruction B and A is verified by accounting and A requires manual review and A is pending escalation

Once I run settlement reconciliation with confirmation for a reconciliation case A using a settlement instruction B, a payment instruction C, and a counterparty confirmation D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

clear_manual_review_flag.description: clear manual review flag for a reconciliation case A using a matching key B and a counterparty account C
preconditions: I can only clear manual review flag for a reconciliation case A using a matching key B and a counterparty account C if it is the case that A is verified by accounting and A requires manual review and A is linked to the matching key B and A is linked to the counterparty account C
effects: Once I clear manual review flag for a reconciliation case A using a matching key B and a counterparty account C, it is not the case anymore that A requires manual review and it is not the case anymore that A is pending escalation

initiate_escalation_request.description: initiate escalation request for a reconciliation case A using a matching key B, a counterparty account C, and an escalation level D
preconditions: I can only initiate escalation request for a reconciliation case A using a matching key B, a counterparty account C, and an escalation level D if it is the case that the validation for A is complete and A is verified by accounting and A is linked to the matching key B and A is linked to the counterparty account C and A is linked to the escalation category D

I can only initiate escalation request for a reconciliation case A using a matching key B, a counterparty account C, and an escalation level D if it is not the case that A is pending escalation and it is not the case that A has an escalation requested
effects: Once I initiate escalation request for a reconciliation case A using a matching key B, a counterparty account C, and an escalation level D, it is the case that A has an escalation requested

process_escalation_with_matrix.description: process escalation for a reconciliation case A using a payment instruction B, a control identifier C, and an escalation matrix D
preconditions: I can only process escalation for a reconciliation case A using a payment instruction B, a control identifier C, and an escalation matrix D if it is the case that the validation for A is complete and A is verified by accounting and A is linked to the payment instruction B and A is linked to the control identifier C and A is linked to the escalation category D
I can only process escalation for a reconciliation case A using a payment instruction B, a control identifier C, and an escalation matrix D if it is not the case that A has an escalation requested
effects: Once I process escalation for a reconciliation case A using a payment instruction B, a control identifier C, and an escalation matrix D, it is the case that A has an escalation requested and A is pending escalation

finalize_escalation.description: finalize escalation for a reconciliation case A using a matching key B and a counterparty account C
preconditions: I can only finalize escalation for a reconciliation case A using a matching key B and a counterparty account C if it is the case that A has an escalation requested and A is pending escalation and A is linked to the matching key B and A is linked to the counterparty account C
effects: Once I finalize escalation for a reconciliation case A using a matching key B and a counterparty account C, it is the case that A has been approved for escalation

Once I finalize escalation for a reconciliation case A using a matching key B and a counterparty account C, it is not the case anymore that A is pending escalation and it is not the case anymore that the validation for A is complete and it is not the case anymore that A requires manual review

ingest_document_for_escalation.description: ingest document a document reference C for escalation in a reconciliation case A using a source file B
preconditions: I can only ingest document a document reference C for escalation in a reconciliation case A using a source file B if it is the case that A has been approved for escalation and A has an escalation requested and the case A has matches and A has the source file B attached and C is available
I can only ingest document a document reference C for escalation in a reconciliation case A using a source file B if it is not the case that the validation for A is complete
effects: Once I ingest document a document reference C for escalation in a reconciliation case A using a source file B, it is the case that the validation for A is complete

mark_documents_verified.description: mark documents verified for a reconciliation case A using a source file B
preconditions: I can only mark documents verified for a reconciliation case A using a source file B if it is the case that A has an escalation requested and the validation for A is complete and A has the source file B attached
I can only mark documents verified for a reconciliation case A using a source file B if it is not the case that A is pending escalation and it is not the case that A has documents verified
effects: Once I mark documents verified for a reconciliation case A using a source file B, it is the case that A has documents verified

verify_document_by_operator.description: verify document for a reconciliation case A by a reconciliation operator B
preconditions: I can only verify document for a reconciliation case A by a reconciliation operator B if it is the case that A has an escalation requested and the validation for A is complete and B is available
I can only verify document for a reconciliation case A by a reconciliation operator B if it is not the case that A is pending escalation and it is not the case that A has documents verified
effects: Once I verify document for a reconciliation case A by a reconciliation operator B, it is the case that A has documents verified
Once I verify document for a reconciliation case A by a reconciliation operator B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

assign_validation_profile.description: assign a validation profile B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only assign a validation profile B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A has documents verified and B is available and A uses the default mapping for the case profile with B
effects: Once I assign a validation profile B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is linked to the variant profile B
Once I assign a validation profile B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

apply_variant_validation_profile.description: apply a validation profile C to a counterparty case variant A using an originating case variant B
preconditions: I can only apply a validation profile C to a counterparty case variant A using an originating case variant B if it is the case that the case A is registered and A has a case variant present and A is a candidate for the case profile C and B is linked to the variant profile C
I can only apply a validation profile C to a counterparty case variant A using an originating case variant B if it is not the case that C is applied to the case A
effects: Once I apply a validation profile C to a counterparty case variant A using an originating case variant B, it is the case that C is applied to the case A

record_evidence_presence.description: record evidence presence for a reconciliation case A using a source file B and a document reference C
preconditions: I can only record evidence presence for a reconciliation case A using a source file B and a document reference C if it is the case that the case A is registered and A has a case variant present and the validation for A is complete and A has documents verified and A has the source file B attached and C is available
I can only record evidence presence for a reconciliation case A using a source file B and a document reference C if it is not the case that evidence is marked present for A
effects: Once I record evidence presence for a reconciliation case A using a source file B and a document reference C, it is the case that evidence is marked present for A

preconditions: I can only close a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is a closure candidate and the case A is registered and the case A has matches and A is verified by accounting and A has an escalation requested and A has documents verified and the validation for A is complete
I can only close a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_profile.description: close a reconciliation case A using a validation profile B
preconditions: I can only close a reconciliation case A using a validation profile B if it is the case that A has a case variant present and the case A is registered and the case A has matches and A is verified by accounting and A has an escalation requested and A has documents verified and the validation for A is complete and B is applied to the case A
I can only close a reconciliation case A using a validation profile B if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a reconciliation case A using a validation profile B, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_evidence.description: close a reconciliation case A with evidence marked present
preconditions: I can only close a reconciliation case A with evidence marked present if it is the case that A has a case variant present and the case A is registered and the case A has matches and A is verified by accounting and A has an escalation requested and A has documents verified and the validation for A is complete and evidence is marked present for A
I can only close a reconciliation case A with evidence marked present if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a reconciliation case A with evidence marked present, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.link_transaction_to_case: link ledger transaction {?ledger_transaction} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_transaction_from_case: unlink ledger transaction {?ledger_transaction} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.attach_source_file: attach source file {?source_file} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.detach_source_file: detach source file {?source_file} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.initiate_investigation: initiate investigation for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with source file {?source_file}
action_nl_templates.assign_reconciliation_operator: assign reconciliation operator {?reconciliation_operator} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.ingest_document_reference: ingest document reference {?document_reference} from source file {?source_file} into reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.apply_validation_profile: apply validation profile {?validation_profile} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.link_matching_key: link matching key {?matching_key} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_matching_key: unlink matching key {?matching_key} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.link_counterparty_account: link counterparty account {?counterparty_account} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_counterparty_account: unlink counterparty account {?counterparty_account} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.link_payment_instruction: link payment instruction {?payment_instruction} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_payment_instruction: unlink payment instruction {?payment_instruction} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.link_control_identifier: link control identifier {?control_identifier} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_control_identifier: unlink control identifier {?control_identifier} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.run_accounting_alignment_check: run accounting alignment check for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with settlement instruction {?settlement_instruction}, matching key {?matching_key}, and counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
action_nl_templates.run_settlement_reconciliation_with_confi: run settlement reconciliation with confirmation for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using settlement instruction {?settlement_instruction}, payment instruction {?payment_instruction}, and counterparty confirmation {?counterparty_confirmation}
action_nl_templates.clear_manual_review_flag: clear manual review flag for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using matching key {?matching_key} and counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
action_nl_templates.initiate_escalation_request: initiate escalation request for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using matching key {?matching_key}, counterparty account {?counterparty_account}, and escalation level {?escalation_level}
action_nl_templates.process_escalation_with_matrix: process escalation for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using payment instruction {?payment_instruction}, control identifier {?control_identifier}, and escalation matrix {?escalation_matrix}
action_nl_templates.finalize_escalation: finalize escalation for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using matching key {?matching_key} and counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
action_nl_templates.ingest_document_for_escalation: ingest document document reference {?document_reference} for escalation in reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using source file {?source_file}
action_nl_templates.mark_documents_verified: mark documents verified for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using source file {?source_file}
action_nl_templates.verify_document_by_operator: verify document for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} by reconciliation operator {?reconciliation_operator}
action_nl_templates.assign_validation_profile: assign validation profile {?validation_profile} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.apply_variant_validation_profile: apply validation profile {?validation_profile} to counterparty case variant {?counterparty_case_variant} using originating case variant {?originating_case_variant}
action_nl_templates.record_evidence_presence: record evidence presence for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using source file {?source_file} and document reference {?document_reference}
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_profile: close reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using validation profile {?validation_profile}
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_evidence: close reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with evidence marked present

predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_transaction: the case {?reconciliation_case} is linked to the transaction {?ledger_transaction}
predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_matching_key: {?reconciliation_case} is linked to the matching key {?matching_key}
predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_counterparty_account: {?reconciliation_case} is linked to the counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_payment_instruction: {?reconciliation_case} is linked to the payment instruction {?payment_instruction}
predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_control_identifier: {?reconciliation_case} is linked to the control identifier {?control_identifier}
predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_settlement_instruction: {?reconciliation_case} is linked to the settlement instruction {?settlement_instruction}
predicate_nl_templates.case_profile_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for the case profile {?validation_profile}
predicate_nl_templates.case_transaction_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for the transaction {?ledger_transaction}
predicate_nl_templates.case_settlement_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for the settlement {?settlement_instruction}
predicate_nl_templates.case_matching_key_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for the matching key {?matching_key}
predicate_nl_templates.case_counterparty_account_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for the counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
predicate_nl_templates.case_payment_instruction_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for the payment instruction {?payment_instruction}
predicate_nl_templates.case_counterparty_confirmation_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for the counterparty confirmation {?counterparty_confirmation}
predicate_nl_templates.case_control_identifier_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for the control identifier {?control_identifier}
predicate_nl_templates.case_escalation_option_link: {?reconciliation_case} is linked to the escalation category {?escalation_category}
predicate_nl_templates.case_variant_profile_link: {?reconciliation_case} is linked to the variant profile {?validation_profile}
predicate_nl_templates.case_profile_default_mapping: {?reconciliation_case} uses the default mapping for the case profile with {?validation_profile}

action_nl_templates_indef.link_transaction_to_case: link a ledger transaction {?ledger_transaction} to a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_transaction_from_case: unlink a ledger transaction {?ledger_transaction} from a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_source_file: attach a source file {?source_file} to a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_source_file: detach a source file {?source_file} from a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.initiate_investigation: initiate investigation for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with a source file {?source_file}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_reconciliation_operator: assign a reconciliation operator {?reconciliation_operator} to a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.ingest_document_reference: ingest a document reference {?document_reference} from a source file {?source_file} into a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_validation_profile: apply a validation profile {?validation_profile} to a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_matching_key: link a matching key {?matching_key} to a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_matching_key: unlink a matching key {?matching_key} from a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_counterparty_account: link a counterparty account {?counterparty_account} to a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_counterparty_account: unlink a counterparty account {?counterparty_account} from a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_payment_instruction: link a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} to a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_payment_instruction: unlink a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} from a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_control_identifier: link a control identifier {?control_identifier} to a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_control_identifier: unlink a control identifier {?control_identifier} from a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.run_accounting_alignment_check: run accounting alignment check for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with a settlement instruction {?settlement_instruction}, a matching key {?matching_key}, and a counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.run_settlement_reconciliation_with_confi: run settlement reconciliation with confirmation for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using a settlement instruction {?settlement_instruction}, a payment instruction {?payment_instruction}, and a counterparty confirmation {?counterparty_confirmation}
action_nl_templates_indef.clear_manual_review_flag: clear manual review flag for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using a matching key {?matching_key} and a counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.initiate_escalation_request: initiate escalation request for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using a matching key {?matching_key}, a counterparty account {?counterparty_account}, and an escalation level {?escalation_level}
action_nl_templates_indef.process_escalation_with_matrix: process escalation for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using a payment instruction {?payment_instruction}, a control identifier {?control_identifier}, and an escalation matrix {?escalation_matrix}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_escalation: finalize escalation for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using a matching key {?matching_key} and a counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.ingest_document_for_escalation: ingest document a document reference {?document_reference} for escalation in a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using a source file {?source_file}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_documents_verified: mark documents verified for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using a source file {?source_file}
action_nl_templates_indef.verify_document_by_operator: verify document for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} by a reconciliation operator {?reconciliation_operator}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_validation_profile: assign a validation profile {?validation_profile} to a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_variant_validation_profile: apply a validation profile {?validation_profile} to a counterparty case variant {?counterparty_case_variant} using an originating case variant {?originating_case_variant}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_evidence_presence: record evidence presence for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using a source file {?source_file} and a document reference {?document_reference}
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_with_profile: close a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using a validation profile {?validation_profile}
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_with_evidence: close a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with evidence marked present

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a reconciliation case or a ledger transaction or a settlement instruction or a counterparty account or a matching key or a payment instruction or a source file or a reconciliation operator or a validation profile or a document reference or a counterparty confirmation or a control identifier or a escalation category is also a object
Everything that is a escalation level or a escalation matrix is also a escalation category
Everything that is a originating case variant or a counterparty case variant is also a reconciliation case
